_instructions: Add bootstrapped startups you find here — they appear on every refresh. Required: name + monthly_revenue. All other fields optional. Remove this _instructions entry when done.

_example.name: My Cool App
_example.description: One-line description of what the startup does.

name: Plausible Analytics
description: Privacy-first Google Analytics alternative. Bootstrapped to $3.4M ARR with 2 founders, no VC. Publicly shares all revenue.

name: Transistor.fm
description: Podcast hosting and analytics. Two-person bootstrapped team publicly shares monthly revenue updates on Indie Hackers.

name: EmailOctopus
description: Email marketing platform built by 2 founders, bootstrapped. Grew to $1.3M ARR without VC, reported on Indie Hackers.
